Title: Insertion of Plant Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has permission to modify plant data.
Test Data: Plant name, species, location, and image.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Inserimento/Modifica Piante" page.
2. Enter the plant name, species, and location.
3. Upload an image of the plant.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The plant data is successfully inserted into the database, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Modification of Plant Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has permission to modify plant data.
Test Data: Updated plant name, species, and location.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Lettura Piante" page.
2. Select a plant to modify.
3. Edit the plant name, species, and location.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The plant data is successfully updated in the database, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Reading Plant Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has permission to read plant data.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Lettura Piante" page.
2. View the list of plants.
3. Select a plant to view its details.
Expected Result: The selected plant's details are displayed, including name, species, location, and image.

Title: Insertion of Diary Entry
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has permission to modify diary entries.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Inserimento/Modifica Diario" page.
2. Enter the diary entry text.
3. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The diary entry is successfully inserted into the database, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Reading Diary Entries
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has permission to read diary entries.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Lettura Diario" page.
2. View the list of diary entries.
3. Select a diary entry to view its details.
Expected Result: The selected diary entry's details are displayed.

Title: User Authentication
Preconditions: User credentials are provided.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
2. Click the "Login" button.
3. Enter the username and password.
4. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The user is authenticated, and the home page is displayed.

Title: Invalid User Authentication
Preconditions: User credentials are incorrect.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
2. Click the "Login" button.
3. Enter the incorrect username and password.
4. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

Title: User Logout
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
2. Click the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged out, and the login page is displayed.

Title: Plant Species Identification
Preconditions: User has taken a photo of a plant.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Analisi Pianta" page.
2. Upload the photo of the plant.
3. Click the "Identify Plant" button.
Expected Result: The plant species is identified, and the result is displayed.

Title: Invalid Plant Species Identification
Preconditions: User has taken a photo of a non-existent plant.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Analisi Pianta" page.
2. Upload the photo of the non-existent plant.
3. Click the "Identify Plant" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the plant species could not be identified.

Title: Download URL of Uploaded Photo
Preconditions: User has uploaded a photo of a plant.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Analisi Pianta" page.
2. Upload the photo of the plant.
3. Click the "Identify Plant" button.
4. Wait for the plant species to be identified.
5. Click the "Download" button.
Expected Result: The download URL of the uploaded photo is displayed.

Title: Reading Personal Storage Path
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
2. Click the "Settings" button.
3. Click the "Personal Storage" button.
Expected Result: The personal storage path is displayed.

Title: Reading Photos for Each Species Present
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
2. Click the "Photos" button.
3. View the list of photos for each species present.
Expected Result: The list of photos for each species present is displayed with their respective download URLs.

Title: Edge Case - No Photos for Any Species
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
2. Click the "Photos" button.
Expected Result: A message indicating that there are no photos for any species is displayed.

Title: Edge Case - No Personal Storage Path
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
2. Click the "Settings" button.
3. Click the "Personal Storage" button.
Expected Result: A message indicating that there is no personal storage path is displayed.

Title: Edge Case - No Diary Entries
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the "Lettura Diario" page.
Expected Result: A message indicating that there are no diary entries is displayed.

Title: Edge Case - No Plant Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the "Lettura Piante" page.
Expected Result: A message indicating that there is no plant data is displayed.

Title: Edge Case - No Authentication
Preconditions: User is not authenticated.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the "Home" page.
Expected Result: The user is prompted to log in before accessing any other functionality.

Title: Edge Case - No Plant Species Identified
Preconditions: User has taken a photo of a plant but it cannot be identified.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Analisi Pianta" page.
2. Upload the photo of the plant.
3. Click the "Identify Plant" button.
Expected Result: A message indicating that the plant species could not be identified is displayed.

Title: Edge Case - No Photos for Plant Species
Preconditions: User has identified a plant species but no photos are available for that species.
Test Steps:
1. Identify a plant species using the "Analisi Pianta" feature.
2. Navigate to the "Photos" page.
Expected Result: A message indicating that there are no photos for the identified plant species is displayed.

Title: Edge Case - No Diary Entry Text

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Inserimento/Modifica Diario" page.
2. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the diary entry text cannot be empty.
